---
title: "Data Collection and Management"
date: 2025-08-25
description: "This workshop introduces participants to the ARBO-WATCH project; its goals, structure, and the monitoring framework that underpins project. By the end of this workshop, participants will understand the field and data workflows used throughout the series."
---

### Mentors

| Name | Institution |
| ---- |------------ |
| Herbert Imboga | JKUAT |
| Susan Mwelu | JKUAT |
| Matabel Odin | JKUAT |
| Nicholas Makumi | JKUAT |
| Damaris Mulwa | JKUAT |
| Abas Mohamed | Ethiopia |


### Prerequisites

Before attending, please ensure you have:

- Installed [R](https://cran.r-project.org/) (version ≥ 4.2) and [RStudio](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/)
- Downloaded and installed [QGIS](https://qgis.org/en/site/forusers/download.html) software
- Installed Kobo Toolbox on your mobile device (available on [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.koboc.collect.android) and [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id323229106))
- Have a working laptop/computer with at least 4 GB of RAM and 256 GB of storage.



## Timetable

**25 August – 2 September 2025**

| Date                  | Time           | Topic                                            | Activities                                                                                                                                                | Facilitator                     |
| --------------------- | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------- |
| [**21 Aug 2025 (Thu)**](day-01.qmd) | 10:00–11:00 AM | Pre-Training Session                             | Welcome & orientation, icebreaker, Google Classroom & breakout rooms, plenary debrief, tech check, Q&A                                                    | Henry Kissinger                 |
| [**25 Aug 2025 (Mon)**](day-02.qmd) | 8:00–8:20 AM   | Opening Remarks & Training Launch                | Training launch                                                                                                                                           | Bernard Bett                    |
|                       | 8:25–10:00 AM  | Data Collection and Ethics                       | Pre-training survey, understanding data, principles of data collection, collection methods, tools, data management, quality management, security & ethics | Anthony Waititu                 |
|                       | 4:00–5:00 PM   | Practical Session                                | Data collection and ethics practicals                                                                                                                     | Mentors                         |
| [**26 Aug 2025 (Tue)**](day-03.qmd) | 8:00–10:00 AM  | Google Forms                                     | Introduction, form creation, question types, settings, themes, preview & publishing                                                                       | Charity Wamwea                  |
|                       | 4:00–5:00 PM   | Practical Session                                | Google Forms practicals                                                                                                                                   | Mentors                         |
| [**27 Aug 2025 (Wed)**](day-04.qmd) | 8:00–10:00 AM  | Kobo Toolbox                                     | Introduction, setup, form building, form management, data analysis, offline collection                                                                    | Henry Kissinger                 |
|                       | 4:00–5:00 PM   | Practical Session                                | Kobo Toolbox practicals                                                                                                                                   | Mentors                         |
| [**28 Aug 2025 (Thu)**](day-05.qmd) | 8:00–10:00 AM  | Excel for Data-Driven Decision Making (Part I)   | Data analysis processes and methods, Excel formulas and functions                                                                                         | Charity Wamwea / Caroline Mugo  |
|                       | 4:00–5:00 PM   | Practical Session                                | Excel practicals                                                                                                                                          | Mentors                         |
| [**1 Sep 2025 (Mon)**](day-06.qmd)  | 8:00–10:00 AM  | Excel for Data-Driven Decision Making (Part II)  | Data validation techniques, Power Query, Pivot Tables                                                                                                     | Winnie Chacha / Caroline Mugo   |
|                       | 4:00–5:00 PM   | Practical Session                                | Excel practicals                                                                                                                                          | Mentors                         |
| [**2 Sep 2025 (Tue)**](day-06.qmd)  | 8:00–10:00 AM  | Excel for Data-Driven Decision Making (Part III) | Data visualization, Excel charting, Pivot Charts, Interactive Dashboards, Post-training survey                                                            | Henry Kissinger / Winnie Chacha |
|                       | 4:00–5:00 PM   | Practical Session                                | Excel practicals                                                                                                                                          | Mentors                         |

Download the [schedule](/materials/workshop_1/Arbo%20Watch%20Training%20Schedule.pdf){.btn .btn-secondary} for easy reference throughout the training series.


## Materials

#### Pre-Training Manual
[Download Pre-Training Manual](/materials/workshop_1/Arbowatch%20Course%20Manual%202025.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

#### List of Participants and Sessions Groups
[Download Participants List](/materials/workshop_1/Participants%20and%20Groups.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

### Facilitators

| Name | Institution |
| ---- |------------ |
| Kissinger Athiany | JKUAT |
| Caroline Wanja Mugo | JKUAT |
| Prof Anthony Waititu | JKUAT |
| Dr Charity Mkajuma Wamwea | JKUAT |
| Dr Winnie Chacha | JKUAT |


### Participants

| Name                            | Country  | Group | Organisation |
| ------------------------------- | -------- | ------| ------------- |
| Henok Tadesse Bireda            | Ethiopia | 1
| Abdirahman Mohamed Abdullahi    | Somalia  | 1
| Seth Ouma Okeyo                 | Kenya    | 1
| Hillary Chebon Chelanga         | Kenya    | 1
| Shafie Abdulkadir Hassan        | Somalia  | 1
| Edith C. Koskei                 | Kenya    | 1
| Joel Lutomiah                   | Kenya    | 1
| Mikias Alayu Alemu              | Ethiopia | 2
| Marian Muse Osman               | Somalia  | 2
| Yusuf Ajack Ibrahim             | Kenya    | 2
| Akengo Hellen                   | Kenya    | 2
| Limbaso Konongoi                | Kenya    | 2
| Ahmed Nor Osman Hassan          | Somalia  | 2
| Esther Nyaboke Bundi            | Kenya    | 2
| Abraham Ali                     | Ethiopia | 3
| Francis Oketch Ochieng          | Kenya    | 3
| Abdullahi Mohamed Mohamud       | Somalia  | 3
| Hellensyombwii Koka             | Kenya    | 3
| Abdirisak Suleiman Osman        | Somalia  | 3
| Margaret Wairimu Wanyeki Nganga | Kenya    | 3
| Millicent Makandi               | Kenya    | 3
| Hamdi Ahmed Ali                 | Somalia  | 4
| Francis Ng'Ang'A                | Kenya    | 4
| Victor Ofula                    | Kenya    | 4
| Samuel Arach Owaka              | Kenya    | 4
| Osman Ahmed Mohamed             | Somalia  | 4
| Valentine Kabita                | Kenya    | 4
| Mesfin Wossen                   | Ethiopia | 4
| Worku Fitesa                    | Ethiopia | 5
| Ahmed Yusuf Mohamed             | Somalia  | 5
| Edith Chepkorir                 | Kenya    | 5
| Abdulkarim Abdulle Yusuf        | Somalia  | 5
| Evalyne Kanyina                 | Kenya    | 5
| Abate Tensai                    | Ethiopia | 5
| Safia Hassan                    | Kenya    | 5
| Mohamed Abdirahman Hashi        | Somalia  | 6
| Fitsum Bekele Endeshaw          | Ethiopia | 6
| Langat Kipngetich Solomon       | Kenya    | 6
| Albert Nyunja                   | Kenya    | 6
| Mulugeta Geremew                | Ethiopia | 6
| Nicholas Kurgat                 | Kenya    | 6
| Abdulrizak Suleiman Osman       | Somalia  | 6
| Aamir Muse Osman                | Somalia  | 7
| James Mutisya                   | Kenya    | 7
| Samson Warkaye Lamma            | Ethiopia | 7
| Francis Mulwa Musili            | Kenya    | 7
| Asnake Worku                    | Ethiopia | 7
| Oscar Gaunya                    | Kenya    | 7
